items.title: Publicis Groupe wins Gucci and Balenciaga global media account from Dentsu
items.summary: Trade press reports Kering awarded its global media-buying account for Gucci and Balenciaga to Publicis Groupe, taking the business from incumbent Dentsu iProspect after a review led by ID Comms. Coverage frames the move as part of Kering's push for sharper marketing ROI amid continued Gucci softness, with Asia-Pacific demand weakness repeatedly cited by trade press as a driver of the broader cost/efficiency push. Factual corporate-media trade story, neutral tone, not consumer sentiment.
